\"Record, when relevant, the start and t: "Rekota, moo ho loketseng, letsatsi la qalo le la pheletso la kamano." (ISDF 6.3) Kenya letsatsi ka mokgwa oo o batlang hore le hlahe leqepheng la pontsho ya mosebetsi, o sebedise ditlhaloso kapa matshwao a mongolo ho bontsha ho se kgolwe ha ho hlokahala.

Record a citation to, and/or information: Rekhoto a citation to, and/or tlhahisoleseding about a publication that is about or based on the use, study, or analysis of the unit of tlhaloso. Include references to e phatlaladitswe facsimiles or transcriptions. (ISAD 3.5.4)

Record the name of the register which gr: Rekhoto the leina of the register which group this archival disebediswa (Audio visual, sound, maniscripts and photographs as an example). When enabled the following text will app: When e buletswe the following text will appear in the %1% metadata section to describe how a modiriši may phihlelelo the original and preservation copy of the faele stored in a linked ya dijithale preservation system. The text appears in the "Ditumello" field. When e thibetswe, the "Ditumello" field is not displayed.

When e buletswe the following text will appear whenever a modiriši tries to jarolla a %1% master with an associated ditokelo statement where the Basis = copyright and the Restriction = maemoal. You can style and customize the text as in a static leqephe.
